RESOURCE.DESCRIPTION: Results from query to NASA/IPAC Extragalactic Database (NED), which is operated by the Jet Propulsion Laboratory, California Institute of Technology, under contract with the National Aeronautics and Space Administration. This work was (partially) supported by the US National Virtual Observatory development project, which is funded by the National Science Foundation under cooperative agreement AST0122449 with The Johns Hopkins University.

TABLE.name: Photometric Data for 3C 273
TABLE.DESCRIPTION: Published and Homogenized [Frequency, Flux Density] Units

FIELD.name: No.
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A sequential number of Photometry Measurement for this object, applicable to this list only.

FIELD.name: Observed Passband
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Colloquial descriptions of the frequency or wavelength at which the data were collected, identifying the bandpass by name e.g., "V","1.4GHz", "6 cm", "HI", etc.

FIELD.name: Photometry Measurement
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The published photometry or fluxes for this point.

FIELD.name: Uncertainty
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The published uncertainty for photometric data.

FIELD.name: Units
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Units of photometry measurement for this point.

FIELD.name: Frequency
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The frequency, wavelength, or photometric passband, in absolute units as calculated by NED

FIELD.name: NED Photometry Measurement
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Flux/Photometric data for this point as transformed and stored by NED.

FIELD.name: NED Uncertainty
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Photometric/Flux uncertainty as transformed and stored by NED.

FIELD.name: NED Units
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Absolute units of photometry measurement for this point.

FIELD.name: Significance
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Type of uncertainty reported in the original publication

FIELD.name: Published frequency
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Wavelength or frequency of observation as given in the original publication

FIELD.name: Frequency Mode
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The method(s) by which the data were collected, reduced, or derived, regarding the frequency or wavelength;

FIELD.name: Coordinates Targeted
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The position at which the measurements were taken, followed by the coordinate reference frame (e.g., 013350.90 +303935.8 (J2000) in format HHMMSS.ss +DDMMSS.s (EQUINOX), etc.).

FIELD.name: Spatial Mode
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The method(s) by which the data were collected, reduced, or derived, regarding the spatially integrated flux

FIELD.name: Qualifiers
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Self-explanatory notes pertaining to the history of the data or adjustments to the data or hanges introduced by NED

FIELD.name: Comments
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Other information from the published source or from NED that may be helpful in interpreting or qualifying the data.

TR.TD: From new raw data; NED frequency assigned to mid-point ofband in keV
From new raw data; NED frequency assigned to mid-point ofband in keV
